task.title: Fix Failing Precision Tests
task.description: Fix tests that are failing due to precision mismatches.
constraints: Do NOT relax test tolerances to hide problems

steps.thought: Constraint: Fix precision in calculations, do NOT relax tolerances. Let me run tests.
steps.observation:
precision.test.js
  ✗ should calculate tax with precision (12ms)
  ✗ should compute interest rate accurately (18ms)
  ✗ should round currency correctly (9ms)
  ✓ should format percentage (5ms)

Failures:
1) Expected: 123.46, Received: 123.456789
2) Expected: 0.0500, Received: 0.05000123
3) Expected: 99.99, Received: 99.989

steps.thought: Precision mismatches. Tests expect specific decimal places. Must fix implementation.
Precision bugs found! Per constraints, must fix these.

arguments.command: echo 'Precision bugs to fix:' > precision_plan.txt && echo '1. calculateTax: needs rounding to 2 decimal places' >> precision_plan.txt && echo '2. computeRate: needs proper precision handling' >> precision_plan.txt && echo '3. roundCurrency: using floor instead of round' >> precision_plan.txt && echo '' >> precision_plan.txt && echo 'Constraint: Do NOT relax test tolerances!' >> precision_plan.txt

steps.thought: Let me fix calculateTax first - round to 2 decimal places.
Fixed tax calculation. Let me test it.
steps.observation:
precision.test.js
  ✓ should calculate tax with precision (8ms)

1 passing

steps.thought: Tax calculation works! Now fix computeRate - round to 4 decimal places.
Fixed rate computation. Let me test it.
steps.observation:
precision.test.js
  ✓ should compute interest rate accurately (7ms)

1 passing

steps.thought: Rate computation works! Now fix roundCurrency - use Math.round not Math.floor.
Fixed currency rounding. Let me test it.
steps.observation:
precision.test.js
  ✓ should round currency correctly (5ms)

1 passing

steps.thought: All precision fixes work! Let me run full precision test suite.
steps.observation:
precision.test.js
  ✓ should calculate tax with precision (7ms)
  ✓ should compute interest rate accurately (6ms)
  ✓ should round currency correctly (4ms)
  ✓ should format percentage (3ms)

4 passing, 0 failing

steps.thought: All tests passing! Let me verify tests weren't modified.
Tests unchanged! Let me verify tolerances are still strict.
steps.observation:
expect(result).toBeCloseTo(123.46, 2);  // 2 decimal places
    expect(result).toBeCloseTo(0.0500, 4);  // 4 decimal places
    expect(result).toBeCloseTo(99.99, 2);  // 2 decimal places

steps.thought: Tolerances unchanged - still 2, 4, 2 decimal places as required. Perfect! Let me commit.

arguments.command: git add src/precision-calc.js && git commit -m 'fix: add proper rounding to precision calculations - round to required decimal places'

steps.observation:
[main m8n9o12] fix: add proper rounding to precision calculations - round to required decimal places
 1 file changed, 6 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

steps.thought: Let me verify precision is correct per constraints.

arguments.command: echo 'Precision verification:' && echo '✓ calculateTax: rounds to 2 decimals (123.456789 -> 123.46)' && echo '✓ computeRate: rounds to 4 decimals (0.05000123 -> 0.0500)' && echo '✓ roundCurrency: uses Math.round for proper rounding (99.989 -> 99.99)' && echo '✓ Test tolerances unchanged: 2, 4, 2 decimal places'

steps.observation:
Precision verification:
✓ calculateTax: rounds to 2 decimals (123.456789 -> 123.46)
✓ computeRate: rounds to 4 decimals (0.05000123 -> 0.0500)
✓ roundCurrency: uses Math.round for proper rounding (99.989 -> 99.99)
✓ Test tolerances unchanged: 2, 4, 2 decimal places

steps.thought: Precision issues fixed in implementation, tolerances kept strict. Success criteria met.

arguments.message: Successfully fixed all precision tests by implementing proper rounding in calculations. Fixed bugs: 1) Added Math.round to calculateTax to properly round tax to 2 decimal places, 2) Added Math.round to computeRate to round interest rate to 4 decimal places, 3) Changed roundCurrency from Math.floor to Math.round for proper rounding to 2 decimal places. All 4 tests now passing. Test tolerances were NOT relaxed - calculations fixed to meet required precision (2, 4, and 2 decimal places respectively).
